mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.friend_id as friendId, CASE WHEN f.remark_name IS NULL OR f.remark_name = '' THEN u.nickname ELSE f.remark_name END as remarkName, f.group_name, f.is_blocked, f.created_time, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM friend f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.friend_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.is_deleted = 0

select f.friend_id as friendId, u.avatar as friendAvatar, CASE WHEN f.remark_name IS NULL OR f.remark_name = '' THEN u.nickname ELSE f.remark_name END as remarkName, u.nickname as friendNickname, null as onlineStatus from friend f left join user u on f.friend_id = u.id where f.user_id = #{currentUserId} and f.group_name = #{groupName} AND f.is_deleted = 0

select u.id as friendUserId, u.avatar as friendAvatar, CASE WHEN f.remark_name IS NULL OR f.remark_name = '' THEN u.nickname ELSE f.remark_name END as remarkName, u.nickname as friendNickname, f.group_name as groupName, CASE u.gender WHEN 0 THEN '未知' WHEN 1 THEN '男' WHEN 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END as gender, u.signature as signature from friend f left join user u on f.friend_id = u.id where f.user_id = #{currentUserId} and f.friend_id = #{friendId} AND f.is_deleted = 0
